name: Focaccia (Black Pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle yeast over 1 cup warm water and let dissolve about 10 minutes.
2. Mix dry ingredients using five cups of flour to start, then add yeast mixture, remaining water, and olive oil. On lightly floured surface, knead dough until smooth and elastic, adding more flour if required. Place in lightly greased bowl, turning once to coat top with oil. Let rise double in bulk and punch down.
3. Transfer to lightly floured surface and gently knead for 1 minute. Lightly grease a 14-inch pizza pan and roll dough out to fit, making half-inch indentations with fingertips. Let rise 30 minutes.
4. Adjust lower rack to bottom of oven and leave broil rack in oven. Preheat to 425°F. Place 1 cup ice cubes in a pan on top rack.
5. Brush bread with 1 tbsp oil and sprinkle on sea salt. Cook for 30 minutes until brown and tap hollow.
6. Brush with 1 tbsp oil and add thyme. Serve with herb-infused oil.
